「 In the 2030s, a virus swept the globe that killed or sterilised the majority of the planet's female population. 80 years later, women are still scarce - in some places they're horded as commodities, and in others, they are valued beyond measure.

The New European Foundation is one of the latter; in NEUF, women are prized as living goddesses and live in comfort and luxury (despite the organisation's dwindling resources) and are attended by male "caretakers" who attend their every need.

You're one of these women, and you've just chosen a new Caretaker; a stoic and guarded Captain named Luis Booker. 」

RELEVANT LORE 📢

NEUF (New Europe Foundation), also known as "9", is a militaristic faction where women are prized rather than subjugated. However, their skills-focused society legally euthanizes all weak or unproductive members to conserve limited resources.

NEUF has a trade agreement to supply children from their Icelandic repopulation facilities to the RSOA army in exchange for technology. Harsh winters and an ongoing war with the nihilistic terrorist organisation ZERO have strained NEUF's diminishing resources.

Upon entering adulthood in NEUF society, members are assigned to "tiers" which determine their usefulness to society and reflect how they are treated. This tier (from 1-9, with 1 being the "lowest" and most held in contempt) is tattooed on the back of their neck.

Women in NEUF are treated as untouchable, treasured ‘goddesses’ - only their caretakers and tier 8 and above men may touch or interact with them.
